But then he says "If you guys kill me, you're going to make a mistake" [132]. This is a direct contradiction. A Tanner would never say "you're going to make a mistake" if they are being voted out.

Justin also showed inconsistent behavior, but James's denial of the Tanner role while simultaneously trying to avoid the vote is more indicative of a Werewolf. Mitchell's claim as Seer suggests one Werewolf is still in play.

parsed_output.justification: James claimed to be the Tanner at [107], but then immediately contradicted this by stating that voting him out would be a 'mistake' at [132]. Since the Tanner's goal is to be voted out, James's fear of elimination strongly suggests he is lying about his role to avoid detection. While Justin also provided inconsistent claims, James's behavior of claiming a role and then panicking when the vote shifted toward him is a classic sign of a Werewolf attempting to deflect suspicion.
